sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n89079" key="prosendi/dwmi" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">προσεν-δίδωμι</orth>, <sense id="n89079.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">give way, yield</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0565.tlg001:1:70b" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Sor.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.70b</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
